summary: Iteration 28: Tested server-side image optimization via Pillow (?w=&q= params), /api/content/calculator endpoint (was 404, now returns 200), and balie page features. All features working correctly. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: /balie and /sauny pages load without errors, product cards display with optimized images, color tabs switch correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Image optimization endpoint (server.py lines 2207-2275) correctly implements Pillow resize + WebP conversion
/api/content/calculator endpoint (line 1251) now returns 200 with empty dict (was 404 in iteration 27)
optimizedImg() helper in utils.js correctly appends ?w=&q= params to /api/images/ URLs
BalieProducts.jsx uses optimizedImg(w=500, q=75) for product cards
BalieColors.jsx uses optimizedImg(w=200, q=70) for color swatches
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server-side image optimization working via Pillow. GET /api/images/{id}?w=500&q=75 resizes to 500px width, quality 75, converts to WebP. Cache key includes resize params. /api/content/calculator now returns 200 (was 404). optimizedImg() helper in utils.js appends w/q params. BalieProducts uses w=500,q=75, BalieColors uses w=200,q=70.

image_optimization_w500_q75.details: GET /api/images/{id}?w=500&q=75 returns WebP image ~51KB (original 1.5MB). 30x compression ratio.

image_original_unchanged.details: GET /api/images/{id} without params returns original image unchanged (1.5MB).

calculator_content_endpoint.details: GET /api/content/calculator returns 200 (was 404 in iteration 27). Returns empty dict {}.

settings_bulk_stock_saunas.details: GET /api/settings/bulk includes _stock_saunas array (1 item) and _catalog_available: true.

sauna_public_models.details: GET /api/sauna/public-models returns models data with caching.

admin_export_auth.details: GET /api/admin/export returns 401 without auth, 200 with valid Basic auth.

balie_page_products.details: /balie page loads with 7 product cards. Images use optimizedImg(w=500, q=75) - confirmed in src URLs.

balie_page_colors.details: Colors section visible with 5 tabs (Fiberglass, Acrylic, Spruce, Thermo, WPC). Tab switching works correctly.

sauny_page_models.details: /sauny page loads with Beczki (3 modeli), Kwadro (7 modeli), Wiking (1 model) categories visible.
